findings.issue: Timestamp in markdown header is redundant—metadata should live in frontmatter or separate config, not document body.
findings.suggestion: Move '*Generated 2026-04-19T18:17:47.141Z*' to YAML frontmatter or remove if auto-generated on read.
findings.est_impact: Reduces re-parsing overhead in memory retrieval systems; ~5-10 tokens saved per read.

findings.issue: Incomplete sentence: 'Cancer-clear (Feb/Mar 2' cuts off mid-thought—no closure or date.
findings.suggestion: Complete the sentence with full date range and status: 'Cancer-clear (Feb/Mar 2026)'.
findings.est_impact: Prevents ambiguity in health context retrieval; blocks misinterpretation in agent decision-making.

findings.issue: Luke health entry mixes medication names, times, and recent incidents without consistent structure—no clear schema for recurring health logs.
findings.suggestion: Formalize as nested object: {medications: [{name, time, dosage}], diet: [], recent_incidents: [{date, event, resolution}]}.
findings.est_impact: Enables reliable parsing by health-monitoring agents; prevents mis-dosing on retrieval.
